narrative:
Springfield Twp township has 2,173 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.6 percentage points.
